name: PassVault
tagline: Secure every credential your team uses in one encrypted vault
metaDescription: PassVault replaces LastPass with zero-knowledge encryption, shared vaults, password generation, and breach monitoring — all included in your AppBuster subscription.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">🔐</text></svg>

features.title: Zero-Knowledge Encryption
features.desc: All vault data is encrypted client-side with AES-256 before it leaves your device. Not even our servers can read your stored passwords or notes.

features.title: Shared Team Vaults
features.desc: Create shared folders for departments, projects, or clients. Control who can view or edit each credential without sharing master passwords.

features.title: Password Generator
features.desc: Generate strong, unique passwords up to 128 characters with configurable rules for uppercase, numbers, and symbols. Never reuse a weak password again.

features.title: Breach Monitoring
features.desc: Continuously scans public data breach databases against your stored credentials. Get instant alerts when a saved login appears in a known leak.

features.title: Browser Auto-Fill
features.desc: Fill login forms with one click across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. The extension detects credential fields and offers matching entries from your vault.

features.title: Secure Notes
features.desc: Store API keys, software licenses, Wi-Fi passwords, and sensitive documents alongside your credentials. Everything shares the same encryption standard.

includes: Browser extensions for all major browsers
